calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-04-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Jon McSweeny, Esq. for Plaintiff: George Ballard Company, a corporation.
Order waiving live witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Chong Kil Kim ind. and dba. The Marble Man.
Matter is taken under submission for review of the Proposed Judgment submitted in court.

Dec. 4, 2006
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $27,378.69
Prejudgment Interest $9,015.00
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $415.00
Bounced Check Damages of $3,000.00, for a total of $40,808.69
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
